pageProps.data:
普通文本输入框

普通输入框使用 flutter 提供的 TextField 组件：

TextField(style: TextStyle(color: Colors.blue),decoration: InputDecoration(icon: Icon(Icons.text_fields_sharp),hintText: 'hello',border: OutlineInputBorder(),hintMaxLines: 2,labelText: 'user',),maxLength: 100,maxLines: 10,// obscureText: true,// textAlign: ,),

当组件（类）的命名参数 obscureText 为 true 时，显示为密码框。

在需要有默认值的时候，需要使用 controller 命名参数进行匹配，但必须是 TextEditingController 类型数据，数据存在于属性的 text 属性中。赋值可以在 initState 生命周期中。

import 'package:flutter/material.dart';class FormShowDemoPage extends StatefulWidget {const FormShowDemoPage({super.key});@overrideState<FormShowDemoPage> createState() => _FormShowDemoPageState();}class _FormShowDemoPageState extends State<FormShowDemoPage> {var username = new TextEditingController();@overridevoid initState() {super.initState();username.text = '默认姓名';}@overrideWidget build(BuildContext context) {return Scaffold(appBar: AppBar(title: Text('123')),body: Padding(padding: EdgeInsets.all(20),child: Column(children: [TextField(controller: username,style: TextStyle(color: Colors.blue),decoration: InputDecoration(icon: Icon(Icons.text_fields_sharp),hintText: 'hello',border: OutlineInputBorder(),hintMaxLines: 2,),maxLength: 100,maxLines: 10,onChanged: (value) {setState(() { username.text = value;});},),],)),);}}
checkbox

在 flutter 中使用 Checkbox 来定义单选框，重要的可选参数为 value 与 onchange 。

class CheckboxDemo extends StatefulWidget {const CheckboxDemo({super.key});@overrideState<CheckboxDemo> createState() => _CheckboxDemoState();}class _CheckboxDemoState extends State<CheckboxDemo> {bool _check = true;@overrideWidget build(BuildContext context) {return Checkbox(value: _check,onChanged: (value) {setState(() {_check = value!;});});}}
CheckboxListTile

带列表的选择框，类似于选择列表：

class CheckboxListTileDemo extends StatefulWidget {const CheckboxListTileDemo({super.key});@overrideState<CheckboxListTileDemo> createState() => _CheckboxListTileDemoState();}class _CheckboxListTileDemoState extends State<CheckboxListTileDemo> {bool _v = true;@overrideWidget build(BuildContext context) {return CheckboxListTile(value: _v,onChanged: (value) {setState(() {_v = value!;});},title: Text('一级标题'),subtitle: Text('二级标题'),);}}
radio

单选组使用 flutter 提供的 Radio 来实现：

class RadioDemo extends StatefulWidget {const RadioDemo({super.key});@overrideState<RadioDemo> createState() => _RadioDemoState();}class _RadioDemoState extends State<RadioDemo> {var sex = 1;@overrideWidget build(BuildContext context) {return Column(children: [Row(children: [Text('男'),Radio(value: 1,groupValue: sex,onChanged: ((value) => setState(() { sex = value!;})),),],),Row(children: [Text('女'),Radio(value: 2,groupValue: sex,onChanged: ((value) => setState(() { sex = value!;})),),],),Row(children: [Text('$sex'), Text('${sex == 1 ? "男" : "女"}')],),],);}}
RadioListTile

使用单选列表组可使用 flutter 提供的 RadioListTile 组件：

class RadioListDemo extends StatefulWidget {const RadioListDemo({super.key});@overrideState<RadioListDemo> createState() => _RadioListDemoState();}class _RadioListDemoState extends State<RadioListDemo> {int sex = 1;@overrideWidget build(BuildContext context) {return Column(children: [RadioListTile(value: 1,groupValue: sex,onChanged: (v) {setState(() {sex = v!;});},title: Text('一级标题'),subtitle: Text('男'),),RadioListTile(value: 2,groupValue: sex,onChanged: (v) {setState(() {sex = v!;});},title: Text('一级标题'),subtitle: Text('女'),),],);}}
switch

开关使用 flutter 提供的 Switch 组件：

class SwitchDemo extends StatefulWidget {const SwitchDemo({super.key});@overrideState<SwitchDemo> createState() => _SwitchDemoState();}class _SwitchDemoState extends State<SwitchDemo> {bool _switch = true;@overrideWidget build(BuildContext context) {return Column(children: [Switch(value: _switch,onChanged: (v) {setState(() {_switch = v;});})],);}}
pageProps.title: 表单组件
